case.review_purpose: pre-import launch readiness check for China
case.product_name: Mantova Equilibrato 特级初榨橄榄油 250ml

decision.summary: Launch readiness is blocked until missing, expired, mismatched, or externally unverified evidence is resolved.
rationale: Offline launch report generated from user-provided bundle data.
User-provided documents and screenshots are T4 evidence until independently verified.
Current platform, regulator, registry, competitor price, and logistics facts require source checks before final action.

documents.holder: Fratelli Mantova / Compagnia Alimentare Italiana S.p.A.
documents.scope: Front label shows Fratelli Mantova Equilibrato Olio Extra Vergine di Oliva, 250ml.

documents.document_type: side origin and manufacturer label photo
documents.scope: Side label states extra virgin olive oil, blend of olive oils of European Union origin and not of European Union origin, obtained directly from olives and solely by mechanical means, cold pressed, bottled in Italy.

documents.holder: Fratelli Mantova / Compagnia Alimentare Italiana S.p.A.
documents.scope: Back label shows nutrition table, storage instruction, barcode 8006830260500, recycling marks, and best-before date visible as 17-09-2027.

market_benchmarks.product_name: 欧丽薇兰 Olivoila 特级初榨橄榄油 250ml
market_benchmarks.channel: 京东搜索 / 京东自营
market_benchmarks.image_alt: 京东页面中的欧丽薇兰 Olivoila 特级初榨橄榄油红标 250ml 商品图
market_benchmarks.takeaway: 欧丽薇兰是中国线上橄榄油的强势大众锚点；Mantova 250ml 若进入中国，需要用中文背标、进口主体和原产地口径与其对齐，但不能只靠意大利风格包装定价。

market_benchmarks.product_name: 伯爵 BORGES 特级初榨橄榄油 250ml
market_benchmarks.channel: 京东搜索 / 京东商品聚合
certification_signals: 部分 SKU 标注保真橄榄油
market_benchmarks.image_alt: 京东页面中的伯爵 BORGES 特级初榨橄榄油 250ml 商品图
market_benchmarks.takeaway: BORGES 是 Mantova 的直接进口品牌对标；250ml 小规格更接近 Mantova 当前包装，但需要进一步核价和确认是否有中文标签/进口商展示。

market_benchmarks.product_name: 晟麦 sanmark 特级初榨橄榄油 250ml
market_benchmarks.channel: 京东 / 天猫价格线索
certification_signals: 京东自营相关品牌入口
market_benchmarks.image_alt: 京东页面中的晟麦 sanmark 特级初榨橄榄油 250ml 商品图
market_benchmarks.takeaway: 晟麦把 250ml 规格与轻食、健身、0反式绑定，说明 Mantova 若做 250ml 小瓶，不能只讲产地，也要明确使用场景和中文卖点。

market_benchmarks.product_name: 贝蒂斯 BETIS 特级初榨橄榄油 250ml
market_benchmarks.channel: 京东搜索 / 京东自营
market_benchmarks.image_alt: 京东页面中的贝蒂斯 BETIS 特级初榨橄榄油 250ml 罐装商品图
market_benchmarks.takeaway: 贝蒂斯显示中国市场对 250ml 小瓶有组合装和礼赠需求；Mantova 可评估 250ml 单瓶试用、双瓶礼盒或整箱经销，而不是只按单瓶进口。

market_benchmarks.product_name: 贝蒂斯 BETIS 特级初榨橄榄油 750ml
market_benchmarks.channel: 苏宁 / 百度购物价格线索
market_benchmarks.image_alt: 京东页面中的贝蒂斯 BETIS 特级初榨橄榄油 750ml 商品图
market_benchmarks.takeaway: 750ml 礼盒价格显著高于 250ml 小瓶价格带，可作为 Mantova 后续礼盒/团购线的高端参照，但不能直接替代 250ml 单瓶定价。

market_benchmarks.product_name: 蓓琳娜 BELLINA 特级初榨橄榄油 500ml / 1L
market_benchmarks.channel: 京东搜索 / 京东自营
market_benchmarks.image_alt: 蓓琳娜 BELLINA 特级初榨橄榄油 500ml / 1L
market_benchmarks.takeaway: BELLINA 证明主流进口橄榄油在中国常用 500ml/1L 家庭装承接复购；Mantova 250ml 更适合试用、礼赠或高端小瓶，而非家庭主力装。

market_benchmarks.product_name: 爷爷的农场 特级初榨橄榄油 500ml
market_benchmarks.channel: 京东自营 / 进口食用油搜索
market_benchmarks.image_alt: 爷爷的农场 特级初榨橄榄油 500ml
market_benchmarks.takeaway: 母婴/儿童食用油是中国橄榄油的重要细分场景；Mantova 若不做儿童/辅食定位，应避免借用这类高敏感宣称。

market_benchmarks.product_name: Olis Bargalló 百谷纳 特级初榨橄榄油 750ml / 3L
market_benchmarks.channel: 京东自营 / 进口食用油搜索
market_benchmarks.image_alt: Olis Bargalló 百谷纳 特级初榨橄榄油 750ml / 3L
market_benchmarks.takeaway: 百谷纳代表西班牙原装原瓶+大容量家庭用油路线；Mantova 250ml 要避免与大容量单位价直接硬拼。

market_benchmarks.product_name: 1号会员店 特级初榨橄榄油 1L
market_benchmarks.image_alt: 1号会员店 特级初榨橄榄油 1L
market_benchmarks.takeaway: 会员店路线强调高周转和单位价；Mantova 如果做进口分销，需要单独核算是否进入会员店/仓储渠道，而不是只做精品小瓶。

market_benchmarks.product_name: Member's Mark 特级初榨橄榄油 3L
market_benchmarks.channel: 京东 / 会员仓储型商品
market_benchmarks.image_alt: Member's Mark 特级初榨橄榄油 3L
market_benchmarks.takeaway: Member's Mark 是大容量价格锚；Mantova 小瓶若要高价，需要用产地、风味、礼赠和进口文件证明差异，不能与 3L 装比单位价。

market_benchmark_summary.copy_avoid_improve: Copy clear local pack-size and channel cues; avoid unverified regulated claims; improve proof for premium pricing.
market_benchmark_summary.listing_preparation: Verify current prices, source URLs, label requirements, brand authorization, and food/category documents before ordering, printing, or listing.
market_benchmark_summary.verification_needed: Competitor rows are offline/user-provided unless marked current_checked; recheck current prices, claims, review counts, and certifications.

requirements.requirement: Confirm the applicant is eligible for the selected platform, marketplace site, and seller route.
Applicant legal name must match submitted entity documents or have a clear authorization chain.
Brand ownership or authorization must cover product scope, territory, marketplace/channel, and review period.
Product category must not be prohibited by the platform or destination country.
Product compliance documents must match the product name, SKU/model, manufacturing site, certificate scope, and destination market.
Labels, warnings, language, and claims must be compatible with the destination market and platform listing rules.
Expiry dates and renewal obligations for licenses, certificates, and authorizations are recorded.
Identify whether the application uses cross-border retail, bonded warehouse, direct mail, or general trade import, then verify the matching China customs and platform route.
Verify Chinese label, product name, ingredients/materials, warnings, claims, and category-specific registration or notification route.
Verify food product classification, import route, facility/importer obligations, and destination-market admissibility from official sources.
Check ingredient, allergen, nutrition, language, warning, date marking, origin, and health/nutrition claims for the destination market.
Current platform, regulator, registry, competitor price, logistics, origin/export, and destination/import facts must be externally verified before final launch action.
requirements.notes: Offline bundle facts are useful for intake and routing but do not replace current T1/T2 source checks.

findings.requirement: Physical trade route must satisfy destination import, label, responsible-party, and customs requirements before shipment.
findings.submitted_evidence: User-provided physical trade case bundle.
findings.observed_issue: Chinese label basis is missing for China food import; visible packaging languages are not enough for local sale.
findings.business_impact: Inventory can be delayed, relabeled, rejected, or held at customs if import route evidence is incomplete.
findings.required_action: Prepare or verify compliant Chinese label artwork before shipment, including product name, ingredients, net content, origin, importer/distributor, nutrition, date/lot, storage, and required standard markings.
findings.acceptable_evidence: Current official import requirements, importer/responsible-party records, compliant local label artwork, customs document set, and logistics route confirmation.

findings.requirement: Physical trade route must satisfy destination import, label, responsible-party, and customs requirements before shipment.
findings.submitted_evidence: User-provided physical trade case bundle.
findings.observed_issue: China food import route is not evidenced yet; importer, customs, inspection, label filing/review, and product document set are not confirmed.
findings.business_impact: Inventory can be delayed, relabeled, rejected, or held at customs if import route evidence is incomplete.
findings.required_action: Confirm the China food import route with importer/customs broker and collect the required customs, inspection, invoice/packing, contract, origin, health/sanitary, and label materials before booking shipment.
findings.acceptable_evidence: Current official import requirements, importer/responsible-party records, compliant local label artwork, customs document set, and logistics route confirmation.

findings.requirement: Physical trade route must satisfy destination import, label, responsible-party, and customs requirements before shipment.
findings.submitted_evidence: User-provided physical trade case bundle.
findings.observed_issue: EU and non-EU olive oil origin wording may not be sufficient for China import origin, COO, and Chinese label claims without supporting documents.
findings.business_impact: Inventory can be delayed, relabeled, rejected, or held at customs if import route evidence is incomplete.
findings.required_action: Verify certificate of origin, manufacturer/exporter documents, ingredient/origin statement, and Chinese label origin wording before using Italy/EU origin cues in import materials.
findings.acceptable_evidence: Current official import requirements, importer/responsible-party records, compliant local label artwork, customs document set, and logistics route confirmation.

evidence.extracted_fact: Marketplace restricted product policy must be checked before listing products that may be illegal, unsafe, or otherwise restricted.
Marketplace prohibited product policy must be checked before listing illegal, unsafe, counterfeit, recalled, or regulated products.
Marketplace content policy can restrict false, misleading, inconsistent, illegal, or unauthorized brand/IP claims.
Marketplace terms require users and sellers to comply with applicable laws and platform rules.
LEI records can support legal entity name and registration verification where the entity has an LEI.
Corporate registry aggregation can help route reviewers to legal entity records, but final verification should use the official registry where available.
Trademark owner, status, class, and territory should be checked in official trademark databases when brand rights affect a decision.
U.S. trademark status, owner, class, and goods/services can be checked through USPTO trademark search.
EU trademark and design records can be checked through EUIPO eSearch plus.
EU Safety Gate provides official alerts for dangerous non-food products and supports recall/safety screening.
CPSC recall records support safety and recall screening for consumer products.
CE marking indicates that a product has been assessed to meet EU safety, health, and environmental protection requirements where applicable.
FCC equipment authorization applies to radiofrequency devices before marketing, importation, or operation in the United States.
FDA routes food businesses to applicable facility registration, labeling, import, and food safety responsibilities.
FDA maintains U.S. food labeling and nutrition information, including label requirements and guidance.
ISO explains that ISO does not perform certification itself and that certificates should be checked with certification bodies where certification is claimed.
China customs/import route and product admissibility should be checked through GACC official sources.
China customs enterprise and declaration services support import route and customs process verification.
China cross-border retail import route should be verified through current customs announcements and official customs rules.
China product quality, labeling, market supervision, and claim issues should be checked through SAMR sources where applicable.
China cosmetics, drugs, medical devices, and related registration/notification routes should be checked through NMPA sources where applicable.
China trademark status, owner, class, and territory should be checked through CNIPA sources when brand rights affect a decision.
FDA routes food businesses to applicable facility registration, labeling, import, and food safety responsibilities.
FDA food facility registration can apply to facilities that manufacture, process, pack, or hold food for U.S. consumption.
CBP directs commercial food importers to relevant food import requirements and agency coordination.
FDA maintains U.S. food labeling and nutrition information, including label requirements and guidance.
FDA explains major food allergens and food allergen labeling requirements.

remediation.applicant_message:
您好，当前申请暂无法完成审核。请补充以下材料：

1. business registration; tax/payee information where required; platform seller eligibility source
   - 原因：Missing or unsupported seller eligibility prevents approval.
   - 要求：材料需覆盖本次平台、目标市场、产品范围、主体名称和有效期。
   - 可接受替代：Official registry/source confirmation or applicant document matching the exact platform, market, product, holder, scope, and validity period.

2. business license or registration certificate; authorization document if applicant differs from rights holder
   - 原因：Major mismatch is high severity and normally requires more information or rejection.
   - 要求：材料需覆盖本次平台、目标市场、产品范围、主体名称和有效期。
   - 可接受替代：Official registry/source confirmation or applicant document matching the exact platform, market, product, holder, scope, and validity period.

3. trademark certificate; brand authorization letter; distribution agreement
   - 原因：Missing or out-of-scope authorization is high severity.
   - 要求：材料需覆盖本次平台、目标市场、产品范围、主体名称和有效期。
   - 可接受替代：Official registry/source confirmation or applicant document matching the exact platform, market, product, holder, scope, and validity period.

4. official platform restricted-products source; official regulator/customs source where relevant
   - 原因：Confirmed prohibited category is critical and leads to rejection.
   - 要求：材料需覆盖本次平台、目标市场、产品范围、主体名称和有效期。
   - 可接受替代：Official registry/source confirmation or applicant document matching the exact platform, market, product, holder, scope, and validity period.

5. test report; certificate; declaration of conformity; COA/SDS/label where relevant
   - 原因：Mismatch or expired evidence is high severity if the category requires certification.
   - 要求：材料需覆盖本次平台、目标市场、产品范围、主体名称和有效期。
   - 可接受替代：Official registry/source confirmation or applicant document matching the exact platform, market, product, holder, scope, and validity period.

6. label artwork; claim substantiation; official label/claim requirements
   - 原因：Unsubstantiated or regulated claims can require rejection or human escalation.
   - 要求：材料需覆盖本次平台、目标市场、产品范围、主体名称和有效期。
   - 可接受替代：Official registry/source confirmation or applicant document matching the exact platform, market, product, holder, scope, and validity period.

7. document inventory with issue/expiry dates
   - 原因：Unknown validity of a core document prevents approval until confirmed.
   - 要求：材料需覆盖本次平台、目标市场、产品范围、主体名称和有效期。
   - 可接受替代：Official registry/source confirmation or applicant document matching the exact platform, market, product, holder, scope, and validity period.

8. platform route source; customs/import source; warehouse or logistics route evidence
   - 原因：Cannot approve China import/cross-border cases until the route and applicable official obligations are verified.
   - 要求：材料需覆盖本次平台、目标市场、产品范围、主体名称和有效期。
   - 可接受替代：Official registry/source confirmation or applicant document matching the exact platform, market, product, holder, scope, and validity period.

请确保材料中的主体名称、品牌、产品范围、销售地区和平台授权范围与本次申请一致。
internal_next_steps: Verify current official platform and regulator sources before final decision.
Complete origin/export and destination/import research tasks for every destination market.
Match submitted documents to holder, brand, product, territory, platform, scope, and validity.
Recheck competitor prices and logistics quotations from current sources.
Revise packaging/listing claims before printing or marketplace submission.

sensitive_data_notes: Generated skeleton contains no applicant document numbers. Redact PII and confidential identifiers after document upload.

disclaimer: Operational qualification review only; not legal advice.

search_methods: 规则包与待核验渠道规划
公开商业搜索/对标检索

decision.summary: Cannot start a final review until platform is provided.
rationale: Generated skeleton is an intake artifact, not a final pass/fail decision.
T4 applicant documents and current T1/T2 source checks must be matched before approval.

requirements.requirement: Confirm the applicant is eligible for the selected platform, marketplace site, and seller route.
Applicant legal name must match submitted entity documents or have a clear authorization chain.
Brand ownership or authorization must cover product scope, territory, marketplace/channel, and review period.
Product category must not be prohibited by the platform or destination country.
Product compliance documents must match the product name, SKU/model, manufacturing site, certificate scope, and destination market.
Labels, warnings, language, and claims must be compatible with the destination market and platform listing rules.
Expiry dates and renewal obligations for licenses, certificates, and authorizations are recorded.
Identify whether the application uses cross-border retail, bonded warehouse, direct mail, or general trade import, then verify the matching China customs and platform route.
Verify Chinese label, product name, ingredients/materials, warnings, claims, and category-specific registration or notification route.
Verify food product classification, import route, facility/importer obligations, and destination-market admissibility from official sources.
Check ingredient, allergen, nutrition, language, warning, date marking, origin, and health/nutrition claims for the destination market.

source_candidates.title: China product regulator for food
source_candidates.why: Destination regulators define admissibility, product safety, labeling, claims, notification, registration, and responsible entity duties.
suggested_queries: China food import registration labeling official regulator
China food product safety claims official

source_candidates.title: China customs and import route
source_candidates.why: Customs sources clarify importer of record, entry documents, admissibility, taxes, and import controls.
source_candidates.access_method: customs authority or government trade portal
suggested_queries: China importer of record food official

source_candidates.title: China trademark and brand authorization route
source_candidates.why: Brand rights must cover territory, class, product scope, grantee, platform/channel, and validity period.
source_candidates.access_method: official trademark registry plus authorization chain review

source_candidates.title: Applicant, manufacturer, importer, and responsible-party registry checks
source_candidates.why: Entity names and roles must match documents, platform account, importer, rights holder, and certification holder.
source_candidates.access_method: official company registry, tax registry, or recognized LEI/company lookup

source_candidates.title: Certificate, issuer, lab, and accreditation checks for food
source_candidates.why: Certificates and reports need issuer validity, lab accreditation, product/model scope, site scope, standard, and expiry checks.
source_candidates.access_method: issuer lookup, accreditation body, certification body registry, or lab scope search

source_candidates.title: Applicable standards and conformity route for food
source_candidates.why: Standards identify the correct test basis and conformity documents for regulated product families.
source_candidates.access_method: official standards body or regulator-referenced standards page

source_candidates.title: Italy to China logistics, warehouse, and platform prep route
source_candidates.why: Freight, dangerous goods, warehouse acceptance, packaging tests, shelf-life, and local delivery affect launch viability.
source_candidates.access_method: forwarder quote, 3PL/warehouse rules, carrier dangerous-goods rules, platform fulfillment policy
suggested_queries: Italy to China freight food dangerous goods requirements

source_candidates.title: Italy export, origin, and COO route
source_candidates.why: Origin-side checks clarify export controls, certificate of origin, manufacturer/exporter documents, and origin labeling consistency.
source_candidates.access_method: origin customs/export authority, trade portal, chamber of commerce, or exporter registry
suggested_queries: Italy export food certificate of origin official

source_candidates.title: China importer, distributor, wholesale, retail, and offline shelf route
source_candidates.why: Physical trade needs a buyer/channel route, local responsibility split, shelf expectations, and offline admission constraints beyond marketplace rules.
source_candidates.access_method: importer/distributor brief, retail buyer checklist, trade association, wholesale marketplace, shelf audit, or user-provided channel
suggested_queries: China food retail shelf imported product requirements

research_tasks.instruction: Verify product classification, regulator, registration/notification, label language, warnings, and claim limits.
Verify importer of record, customs documents, admissibility, tax/VAT route, and import controls.
Verify trademark owner, class, territory, status, expiry, and authorization coverage for platform/channel/product.
Verify applicant, manufacturer, importer, responsible party, rights holder, and certificate holder identity chain.
Verify issuer/lab/accreditation status, standard, model/SKU/product scope, site scope, and expiry.
Verify applicable standards, conformity route, technical-file basis, and allowed marks.
Verify freight constraints, dangerous goods, warehouse acceptance, platform prep, cost basis, and route timing.
Verify export permissions, certificate of origin, manufacturer/exporter documents, and origin label consistency.
Verify importer/distributor/retail channel requirements, buyer documents, local responsibility split, and offline shelf expectations.

source_candidates.title: China product regulator for food
source_candidates.why: Destination regulators define admissibility, product safety, labeling, claims, notification, registration, and responsible entity duties.
suggested_queries: China food import registration labeling official regulator
China food product safety claims official

source_candidates.title: China customs and import route
source_candidates.why: Customs sources clarify importer of record, entry documents, admissibility, taxes, and import controls.
source_candidates.access_method: customs authority or government trade portal
suggested_queries: China importer of record food official

source_candidates.title: China trademark and brand authorization route
source_candidates.why: Brand rights must cover territory, class, product scope, grantee, platform/channel, and validity period.
source_candidates.access_method: official trademark registry plus authorization chain review

source_candidates.title: Applicant, manufacturer, importer, and responsible-party registry checks
source_candidates.why: Entity names and roles must match documents, platform account, importer, rights holder, and certification holder.
source_candidates.access_method: official company registry, tax registry, or recognized LEI/company lookup

source_candidates.title: Certificate, issuer, lab, and accreditation checks for food
source_candidates.why: Certificates and reports need issuer validity, lab accreditation, product/model scope, site scope, standard, and expiry checks.
source_candidates.access_method: issuer lookup, accreditation body, certification body registry, or lab scope search

primary_checks: origin export controls and certificate of origin
local label, registration, and retail/distributor channel requirements
Incoterms, freight, tax, warehouse, and insurance route
